evals.prompt: Playwright 테스트가 실패하고 있어. 디버깅하고 고쳐줘
evals.expected_output: test_run으로 전체 테스트 실행, 실패별 test_debug, browser tools로 에러 조사, 근본 원인 분석, 코드 수정 후 재검증
expectations: Runs test_run to execute the full test suite and identify failures
Uses test_debug to pause at each failing test's failure point
Investigates failures using at least 2 browser tools (snapshot, console_messages, network_requests, evaluate)
Identifies and states the root cause category (selector drift, timing race, stale assertion, or other)
Modifies the test code to fix the identified issue
Runs test_run again after fixing to verify the test passes

evals.prompt: tests/flaky-todo-count.spec.ts 테스트가 가끔 통과하고 가끔 실패해. flaky 테스트 원인 찾아서 고쳐줘
evals.expected_output: test_run 반복 실행으로 flaky 패턴 확인, 타이밍/레이스 컨디션 분석, waitFor/적절한 대기 추가
expectations: Runs test_run at least twice to observe the flaky pass/fail pattern
Uses test_debug or browser tools to investigate the intermittent failure
Identifies timing or race condition as the root cause (not just selector issue)
Adds explicit waits such as expect(locator).toBeVisible() or waitForURL before the flaky interaction
Does not use hard-coded sleep or arbitrary timeout values as the fix
Runs test_run at least 2 more times after fixing to confirm stability

evals.prompt: UI가 리디자인돼서 셀렉터가 다 바뀌었어. 테스트 전부 깨졌는데 한번에 고쳐줘
evals.expected_output: test_run으로 전체 실패 목록 확인, test_debug + browser_generate_locator로 새 셀렉터 확인, 각 테스트 파일 수정, getByRole/getByText 우선 사용
expectations: Runs test_run to get the complete list of all failing tests
Uses test_debug to inspect each failure and understand the new DOM structure
Uses browser_generate_locator or browser_snapshot to find updated selectors
Updates selectors using getByRole, getByText, or getByLabel instead of raw CSS selectors
Fixes each test file individually and re-runs test_run after each fix to verify
All originally failing tests pass after the healing process completes

evals.prompt: tests/dashboard-date.spec.ts 테스트가 날짜나 카운터 같은 동적 데이터 때문에 실패해. 매번 값이 달라져서 assertion이 안 맞아
evals.expected_output: 동적 데이터 assertion 실패 진단, 정규식 매처나 toContainText 같은 유연한 검증으로 교체
expectations: Runs test_run to identify the assertion failure caused by dynamic data
Uses test_debug or browser_evaluate to inspect the actual dynamic value
Identifies that the failure is due to changing data (date, counter, timestamp) not a code bug
Replaces exact-match assertions with flexible matchers (regex, toContainText, or pattern-based)
Does not hard-code specific dynamic values as expected results
Runs test_run to verify the updated assertion passes

evals.prompt: tests/cookie-blocked-click.spec.ts 테스트에서 클릭하려는 버튼이 쿠키 배너에 가려져서 실패해. 고쳐줘
evals.expected_output: 클릭 차단 원인 진단 (cookie-banner overlay), overlay dismiss 후 클릭하도록 수정
expectations: Runs test_run to identify the click interception failure
Uses test_debug and browser_snapshot to identify the blocking overlay element
Identifies the root cause as modal/overlay/banner blocking the target element
Fixes by either dismissing the overlay first or waiting for it to disappear before clicking
Does not use force click as the primary fix (addresses the root cause instead)
Runs test_run to verify the fix works

evals.prompt: Several spec files are failing with different errors - some have wrong selectors, one has a timing issue, and another has a stale assertion. Fix them all
evals.expected_output: 복합 실패: 셀렉터/타이밍/assertion 각각 다른 원인. 개별 진단 후 하나씩 수정, 각 수정 후 재검증
expectations: Runs test_run to get the full list of all failing tests across multiple spec files
Uses test_debug on each failing test to diagnose individually
Correctly categorizes each failure into different root causes (selector, timing, assertion)
Applies appropriate fix strategy per failure type (not a one-size-fits-all approach)
Fixes and re-runs tests incrementally rather than changing everything at once
All originally failing tests pass after the complete healing process
